seoTitle: Create a Newsletter in HubSpot: Design & Setup
metaDescription: Design and send a HubSpot newsletter using the drag-and-drop editor, personalization tokens, audience segmentation, and multi-device previews.
intro: HubSpot's email editor makes it possible to build a newsletter without touching code, from picking a starter layout to adding personalization tokens for each recipient. This guide covers the full workflow, including setting up your subscriber list and suppression rules, and testing across devices before sending. It's a solid starting point whether you're sending your first newsletter or refining an existing routine.

steps.heading: Start a new email campaign
steps.body: Go to the Marketing menu, open the Email workspace, and click Create Email, then choose the Regular campaign type.

steps.heading: Pick a newsletter template
steps.body: Browse the template gallery and select a clean newsletter starter layout to build from.

steps.heading: Add your content blocks
steps.body: Drag and drop blocks to insert your logo, images, and article copy into the layout.

steps.heading: Personalize with contact tokens
steps.body: Highlight text and use the personalize option to insert dynamic fields like first name or company.

steps.heading: Configure settings and audience
steps.body: Set your subject line, preview text, subscription type, and choose your target recipient lists.

steps.heading: Test and review before sending
steps.body: Send a test email and check the mobile and desktop preview panels before scheduling delivery.

faq.question: Can I personalize a newsletter for each recipient?
faq.answer: Yes, HubSpot's editor supports personalization tokens like first name or company name pulled from contact properties.

faq.question: How do I make sure I'm emailing the right audience?
faq.answer: You choose targeted recipient lists and can set suppression parameters to exclude specific segments.

faq.question: Does HubSpot let me preview the newsletter on mobile?
faq.answer: Yes, the editor includes multi-device preview panels so you can check how the layout renders before sending.

faq.question: What's included in the settings tab for a newsletter?
faq.answer: It covers sender profile, subject line, preview text, and the legal footer components required for compliance.
